title: Oral-B 1•2•3 Extra Fresh Toothpaste 75ml, Pack of 6 | with Active Fluoride for Anti-Cavity Protection, Whitening & Long-Lasting Fresh Breath
features: COMPLETE CARE: Three-way protection formula with active fluoride helps fight cavities, whiten teeth, and provide long-lasting fresh breath
PACK CONTENTS: Six tubes of Oral-B 1-2-3 Extra Fresh toothpaste, each containing 75ml for extended supply
CAVITY PROTECTION: Active fluoride formula helps strengthen tooth enamel and protect against decay
WHITENING ACTION: Regular use helps remove surface stains for naturally whiter teeth
FRESH BREATH: Extra fresh formula delivers lasting freshness throughout the day
description: Product description Experience comprehensive oral care with Oral-B 1-2-3 Extra Fresh Toothpaste, now available in a convenient pack of six 75ml tubes. This toothpaste combines three essential benefits in one formula: active fluoride for fighting cavities, whitening action for brighter teeth, and a refreshing mint flavour for long-lasting fresh breath. The active fluoride formula works continuously to protect your teeth against cavities whilst helping to maintain strong, healthy teeth. Each tube is perfectly sized for both home use and travel, ensuring you never compromise on your oral hygiene routine. The invigorating extra fresh formula leaves your mouth feeling clean and refreshed throughout the day. This multipack offers excellent value, providing a long-lasting supply of premium toothpaste for the whole family. Make Oral-B 1-2-3 Extra Fresh Toothpaste part of your daily oral care routine for a confident, healthy smile. Ingredients Aqua, Sorbitol, Hydrated Silica, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Cellulose Gum, Aroma, Trisodium Phosphate, Carbomer, Sodium Fluoride, Sodium Saccharin, Sodium Hydroxide, Limonene, Polysorbate 80, Glycerin, CI 74160
